title: Opinion: Opinion | The Problem With Trump's Fantasy Of A 'Crippled' Iran
summary_full: Even a relatively insulated US economy cannot entirely escape the ripple effects of sustained disruptions in one of the world's most critical energy corridors.
summary_public: Even a relatively insulated US economy cannot entirely escape the ripple effects of sustained disruptions in one of the world's most critical energy corridors.
